entry.title: Re: SHIPTO is not showing in printed PO
entry.content:
Hello,

There is a parameter setting that could cause this if you're missing an address template. Hopefully Name of the address is not displayed in BillTo/ShipTo section on PO Print helps!

entry.title: Re: Stock transfer between Batch and Non Batch managed Plants
entry.content: Hi Cheng, how are you? Were you able to solve your issue? Can you tell me how, please? Thanks

entry.title: Re: CL20N All value for release strategy
entry.content: Please do not post a question about SAP Web sites (community, etc.) if it's not a question about SAP Web sites! You can use Technology Q&A or any groups. See here: https://community.sap.com/t5/questions-about-sap-websites/how-to-ask-a-question-in-sap-community-gt-2024/qaq-p/13684801

entry.title: Re: BW HANA Sizing - Results interpretation /SDF/HANA_BW_...
entry.content: Thanks for your reply. I understand it shouldnt be added and I read the notes and pdfs before posting my question. However none of the guides provides the answer to this question: which is then the recommended BW/4HANA DB Size after the output of that result? Lets set aside for the moment the future growth and keep it for one node.

entry.title: Re: Attendance and Absence Report with LATE IN and EARLY OUT
entry.content:
HI @Nachiketa 

we discussed your requirements and have the following idea:

1. Calculate the late coming time and early leaving time in daily time containers

2. Provide a story report with three tables on three different data sources that share the same filter. Filter could be Date (range), Employee

Tables are:

A Attendances and Absences with RecordedTimeDataViewV2 to see 1, 2, and 3 (New Reporting Capabilities for Absences and Attend... - SAP Community)

B Daily Time Container to see 4 and 5

C Planned working time with Planned Working Time reporting object to see 6 (Reporting of Planned Working Time with Story Reports | SAP Help Portal)

We hope this is helpful.

Best regards

Stephanie

entry.title: Re: Last Indicator Value in Line Monitor POD within SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hello Shamshul,

thank you very much! Great to hear that all worked well.

Just as a side note: with release 2405 we are extending the Last Indicator Value plugin to cache and expose up to 5 last values. At design time, you can define whether you want to make use of single or multiple values.  An example of the extended plugin is the following:

Best regards, Harry

entry.title: Re: CL20N All value for release strategy
entry.content: Hi, i am in the ERP QA ,no?

entry.title: Re: Inquiry Regarding Access to SAP Ariba System for Trai...
entry.content:
Hello and welcome! 

A good place when first starting out is the Resource Center, which includes tutorials and training by the SAP product you are learning. Your enablement team should help set up your Test environment to get hands-on experience too.

entry.title: Re: CL20N All value for release strategy
entry.content: No, you did it wrong first (as you can see in my screenshot), now it's fixed because someone has repaired it for you. The problem is that everyone who subscribed to "SAP Websites" questions are receiving your question.

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services

entry.title: Re: BW HANA Sizing - Results interpretation /SDF/HANA_BW_...
entry.content:
Considering the recommended values, it will be:

  • Memory (RAM):       3 x 838 GB
  • Disk size for DATA:  3 x 1271 GB
  • Disk size for LOGS:  3 x 512GB

entry.title: Re: Is there a configuration guide for the latest applica...

entry.title: Re: Exploring SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI: A Comprehensive Review
entry.content:
Hi,

We already have maintained SNC Names for every user in SU01 with format p:CN=XXXX@YYYYYYY.

Now we get following error :

"No user exist with SNC name "p:CN=XXXX, L=slsserver.accounts.ondemand.com, OU......."

We don't want to change the already maintained SNC names in SU01. CETRULE is not working.

Which other options do we have to map the SNC name to the user ?

Regards

Uwe

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hello from Seattle.

entry.title: bods job took long time to execute
entry.content:
Hi All,

A bods job taking around 8-9-10 Hrs to complete. Upon checking in trace log, a particular DF taking around 5-6 Hrs to compete successfully, PFA.

This DF contains a SQL tranformation(sql query operation), followed by a query tranformation followed by a key generation and finally the target table. Please let me know where I need to check/fine tune to reduce this job execution time. Let me know anything further information required.

Regards

Siba

entry.title: How to remove the location from Onbaording 2.0 candidate's dashboard
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a requirement that we need to remove the Location from Onboarding Candidate's dashboard.Please find the below screenshot for your refernece. If any one knows kindly help me with the same.

Thanks,

Satya!

entry.title: S/4 Output Management in Procurement: send to e-mail of contact person
entry.content:
Hi all,

I need to send my PO to partner function AP (CP) = contact person. Not to the vendor function (LF).

BRF+ decision table for the email recipient: I use the "default email address" expression.

My PO looks like this:

But no contact person's data is determined (no language, no e-mail address)

Does anybody know if the "default address" logic works only for partner type LF? 

Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Batch split error as stock is not available for material and batch for VL02N
IAS for Onboarding Welcome Email not triggering - How to troubleshoot
entry.content:
Hello SAP SF Community, 

IAS configuration has been completed for Onboarding and the users (new hires) are being created (when the onboarding process is initiated) yet the Welcome Email is not being sent from IAS. 

Would someone please help with the troubleshooting steps? 

All help is appreciated,

Carolina Rojas.

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services - Week 3
Want to learn more about SAP Master Data Governance at SAP Sapphire 2024?
entry.content:
Your company wants accurate, complete, and trusted data to master your digital business processes and business models. The SAP Master Data Governance application provides ready-to-run, domain-specific master data governance, enabling you to decentrally own and consolidate and to centrally create, change, and distribute master data across your enterprise system landscape. Tight integration with other SAP solutions supports the reuse of data models, business logic, and validation frameworks with open integration to third-party products and services to support your entire technology stack. It supports cleansing, standardization, duplicate detection, and best-record calculation. It then lets you synchronize clean and standardized data across cloud and on-premise applications.

And here is what we have for you to learn more about SAP MDG at the 2024 SAP Sapphire in Orlando, Florida.

BTP115 Looking forward:  SAP Master Data Governance

Learn how the SAP Master Data Governance application can support your transformation journey. Join a discussion on the technology shift to cloud-ready master data management, with support for process automation, agility through federation, data provider integration, and reimagined hierarchy management.

  • June 5th @ 2:00 PM

BTP160 Build a comprehensive data strategy that prioritizes governance

Data governance is a foundational element in driving innovation. Learn how the SAP Master Data Governance application, SAP Datasphere solution, and Collibra software maximize the value of your analytics and AI initiatives. Hear SAP’s strategy in support of master data management and the creation of a business data fabric for access to trusted data.

  • June 5th @ 11:00 AM

BTP170 How Kyndryl drove data modernization and trust through transformation

Hear IT infrastructure services company Kyndryl Inc's "Customer Zero Story" as it drove business value by transforming a disparate data and application landscape into a unified, governed source of truth. Hear how Kyndryl delivered innovation through data modernization with the help of the SAP Master Data Governance application and SAP BTP.

  • June 4th @ 3:00 PM

ERP158 Avantor: Transforming finance with SAP S/4HANA for central finance

Avantor Inc., a biotech, chemicals, and pharmaceuticals firm, embarked on a finance transformation with the SAP S/4HANA solution for central finance and SAP Master Data Governance application. Hear how it streamlined processes and launched new segment reporting, including group reporting, a secondary database, and the SAP Analytics Cloud solution.

  • June 5th @ 10:30 AM

To see a full list of SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) sessions, solution demos, and demo stations, click here.

Enjoy your SAP Sapphire 2024 experience!

#SAPSapphire #SAP #SAPMDG #MDG #MDM #MasterData #MasterDataManagement #datagovernance

entry.title: Re: error w while trying to create a blog
entry.content: Thanks for this information

entry.title: Re: Issue: Migration of product posting with Foot-Base UO...
entry.content:
Hi @Gagan1 

 

Entering a serial number profile is only possible if the base unit of measurement is dimensionless. Please check the settings of the Base UoM in the Configuration Activity Units of measurement ( 102179 )

In the Configuration Activity Units of measurement ( 102179 ) you have the possibility to create your own custom UOM and make it dimensionless if you wish to avoid the error 

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Its possible the Cross Plant maintenance company in s...
entry.content:
Hi @Bcerqueiro 

 

My understand is that the cross maintenance scenario you describe is possible in S/4HANA Cloud for Asset Management . I checked and could find no restrictions that would say its not achievable

 

Regards

Enda

entry.title: Kyndryl Shines a Spotlight on Master Data at 2024 Sapphire Orlando
entry.content:
Kyndryl (NYSE: KD) is the world’s largest IT infrastructure services provider, serving thousands of enterprise customers in more than 60 countries. The company designs, builds, manages, and modernizes the complex, mission-critical information systems that the world depends on every day.

Kyndryl became an independent company from IBM in November 2021 and had a 2-year timeframe (TSA exit) to separate. The legacy systems Kyndryl inherited were heavily customized and expensive to manage. Kyndryl required IT systems to move towards a lean, modern company.  The decision that simplicity would be the foundation of their separation strategy, resulted in a greenfield implementation of SAP S/4HANA, leveraging SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP).  The planned result is a simplified, streamlined, and optimized SAP business platform.

One crucial aspect of Kyndryl’s transformation was emphasizing the importance of master data in the journey to SAP S/4HANA. Clean, reliable, and well-governed master data was essential for a successful and efficient transition to SAP S/4HANA, and this is one area where Kyndryl sets itself apart. While master data management (MDM) is often overlooked for its critical role in business transformation, MDM can propel organizations to achieve their strategic goals more effectively and efficiently.

Data was scattered and difficult to find throughout the organization, with more than 68 disparate information/data warehouses, multiple master data applications and visualization tools, and no central governance or single source of truth. Decentralized and reactive services allowed for limited data visibility.

They chose SAP Master Data Governance (MDG), in conjunction with SAP BTP technologies, to provide the business with accurate, consistent, and timely business-critical master data. This lays the foundation for actionable business intelligence and analytics, accurate reporting, and streamlined business processes, enabling efficient decision-making and driving business growth.

SAP MDG provided a single definition and source of their master data and removed local standards and practices which deviated from the central depiction of the master data.  They leveraged SAP Integration Suite to enable distribution of their master data to both SAP and non-SAP solutions across the company.

Kyndryl’s SAP platform provides consistent client experience, improves delivery efficiencies, supports automation objective, and reduces technical duplication across the enterprise aligning with an enterprise platform strategy for enterprise functions.

Want to learn more?

  • Read the full story here, Kyndryl’s 2024 SAP Innovation Awards entry.
  • Learn about Kyndryl’s partnership with SAP.
  • Check out their session at Sapphire Orlando on June 4th at 3 PM, BTP170:  How Kyndryl drove data modernization and trust through transformation.

#SAPSapphire #SAP #SAPMDG #MDG #MDM #MasterData #MasterDataManagement #datagovernance

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI crashes during script run
entry.content: Hello! did you find out why it freeze?

entry.title: Re: ByD / C4C Built-in Support is down
entry.content: Is there any timeframe on when this will be back up? Built-in support is the primary channel that many customer have for engaging SAP, including for critical issues.

entry.title: Updating LIPS Custom Fields In Outbound Delivery Using BAPI
entry.content:
Hey people,

I have an Issue in which I fail to update delivery item fields when using 'BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE'

I'll let you consider the following setting:

  • My System is ECC 6.0
  • I have extended standard table LIPS with a new field 'ZZEXT_REF'
  • I am receiving an update to the field mentioned with an incoming IDOC
    • something like [vbeln, posnr, ....., zzext_ref]

The solution I have gathered is this:

  1. Receive Delivery Number, Item Number, ZZEXT_REF from IDOC
  2. Call BAPI 'BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE' with 
    1. DELIVERY = Delivery Number from IDOC
    2. EXTENSION2 = (
      1. ROW = Delivery Row
      2. FIELD = ZZEXT_REF
      3. VALUE = Value from IDOC
  3. Implement BAdI SMOD_V50B0001~EXIT_SAPLV50I_010 (Similar to what is done here)
    1. Export EXTENSION2 values using static member of a BAdI "
      LE_SHP_DELIVERY_PROC
      " Class
  4. Implement (as said above) a BAdI Class of "LE_SHP_DELIVERY_PROC"
    1. Implement SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE, extract the data from the static member and insert it into field ZZEXT_REF of table CT_XLIPS at POSNR = ROW from EXTENSION2
  5. Call Commit After Calling 'BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE'

The problem is that it all runs well except for the actual change save to table LIPS,
I thought it might be caused due to some efficiency mechanism that detected no changes to standard LIPS fields and therefore figured no changes should be done and dropped the change to db.

Suggestions will be suuuuuper useful.

Thanks,

Ariel.

entry.title: Re: Strategy to resolve taxes not being sent correctly on...
entry.content:
Hello,

The error message present in the Invoice History on the Business Network might help identify the exact issue. Sounds like it could be a configuration/ integration discrepancy or an issue with the rounding rules for taxes.

entry.title: Variable Pay - Basis Calculation
entry.content:
Hi

I have a question regarding basis calculation. We want to use the latest salaries and Bonus Target % for basis calculation so want to use "Fixed effective date in EC(Point in time calculation)" option. But there is also a requirement to make custom calculations to basis.

Is there a way to use custom formula option with effective date such that only latest salaries and bonus Target % is used?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Variable Pay - Basis Calculation
entry.content: @xavierlegarrec I'd appreciate your response to this query. Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Update BSEG-ZUONR from F110
entry.content:
I am trying to update the BSEG-ZUONR from F110. I seen few posts about similar requirement, but didn't find any constructive solutions. I tried the following BTE & User exit, but they are not working either. 

1. 00001830 PAYMENT PROGRAM: Edit Group2

2. RFFOX043. 

Any pointers on how to solve the issue?

entry.title: Re: Call a Remote Function Module (RFC) From SAP Cloud Platform ABAP Environment - update 09/2020
entry.content:
Thanks for taking your time to do this.

Remember, there is no such thing as "on-premise" in real English.
"Premise" is a concept.
"Premises" is a location.

"https://collectivecontent.agency/2018/04/19/should-i-say-on-premise-or-on-premises-it/"

entry.title: Re: sap mdk action bar style navigating from object list...
entry.content: from my testing if you have a rule for OnBackButtonPressed defined for the page the button styling is not correctly applied. I will open an internal bug for this so we can address in a future patch

entry.title: Re: Ariba invoicing
entry.content:
Hi, 

I suggest running a report to see if all 4 bank accounts are Verified: Supplier Remittance and Bank Account Change Reporting 
The Remittance location set by the supplier should automatically be selected when you trigger a payment. Here's some other general info that may help with your question: Managing Supplier Payment Information

entry.title: Can we change Customer Pricing Procedure (01) during Sales Orders creation?
entry.content:
Issue Description:

We need assistance with configuring the customer pricing procedure during sales order creation. Currently, we have only one standard order document type in the public cloud. Our configuration is based on the sales area AC25|DE|AM, document type Y1, and customer pricing procedure.

Challenges:

  1. The user does not want to change the customer pricing procedure at the BP (Business Partner) level.
  2. The user wants to be able to change the customer pricing procedure during the sales order creation.
  3. We need guidance on how to assign one or more pricing procedures to the same sales area and document type combination in the public cloud environment.

Request for Assistance:

We need support to:

  1. Enable dynamic determination of the pricing procedure during sales order creation without modifying the BP level.
  2. Explore options for assigning multiple pricing procedures to the same sales area and document type combination.

Please provide guidance on how to achieve these configurations in the public cloud setup.

entry.title: Re: Is creating Multiple G/L Accounts Using a Spreadsheet...
entry.content: See https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/8209b22aa04046c68bfaa2b63890b569.html?locale=en-us

entry.title: Re: How to configure an “Expiration Alert” within an MDF Object and apply it retrospectively
entry.content: Please note that as per implementation guide https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_EMPLOYEE_CENTRAL/7b2dec4ed4d9459f893cce6f5920528d/c0ceff77ad2c495a85699a4ffd7bfc90.html, an Off Cycle Event Batch needs to be configured for Work Order Expiration Notification as well.

entry.title: Dep Care FSA is now excluded from taxable wages for both SIT and EIT for Pennsylvania employees.

we need to Stop withholding for tax year 2024 on dependent care benefits (up to $5,000) for Pennsylvania employees in SAP system.

Dep Care FSA is now excluded from taxable wages for both SIT and EIT. Need to update SAP to reduce taxable wages for Pennsylvania employees.

please suggest any update released by SAP on this?

I have to create a new transformation for the same. Is this a limitation? Or I am missing something here? Please advise.

Thanks,

Phani

entry.title: Re: Unable to load shared library '/home/site/wwwroot/libadonetHDB.dll' or one of its dependencies.
entry.content:
You can download the HANA Client from https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/#hanatools 

Specifically the .NET driver for Linux can be found at
https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/additional/hanaclient-dotnetcore-latest-linux-x64.tar.gz

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Hi @kyo_choi2 @jrumpl ,

I disabled the Resource Saver in Docker Desktop, and it fixed the connection issue happening after few ours of my Win11 computer is idle / locked.

According to the Docker documentation the Resource Saver setting should not suspend tcp connections or similar. Do not understand why, but looks like it works. I hope this helps your computer as well.

entry.title: MDK record audio
entry.content: Hello expert, I am developing an app with MDK and now I am trying to implement a function to record audio. Is there a way to do this natively without the need to add a NativeScript plugin?

entry.title: Re: MARD table inconsistency Stock not update as per Repo...
entry.content:
Hello @nikita121 

MARD keeps stock on a storage location level. So if your batch doesn't have any stock on in storage locations, but it has some stock on a plant level, then you might get the result you have. 

You have not provided any details on MCHB content or MMBE, MB52 results, so it's all but impossible to tell more.

Also consider the note 2795898 - MARD: Missing or wrong special stock, unrestricted-use stock in MMBE

If you are already on S/4HANA, make sure to read the note 2206980 - Material Inventory Managment: change of data model in S/4HANA

Best regards 

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Text Color Not working
entry.content:
Hello @Dan_Wroblewski,

I have the same issue, it happens to the hidden text after a page is mounted, if the visibility text is set to false and true after that the style comes back to normal.

Using 'Open page' or 'Replace page' function the error happens again, but with 'Navigate back' it doesn't so my theory is that the error only occurs when the page is mounted not when the page is focused, the text style its not binded to any variable just the visibility and it only happens with the same text, I'll attach some screenshots.

entry.title: Re: SAP authorization testing with reference users
entry.content:
Very helpful approach, may i ask you the link to the document which give the evidence of low impact on performance if you consider till 1000 users?

 

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: MDK record audio
entry.content:
MDK does not provide any out of the box solution for recording audio.  You will need to create an extension control if you want to do it from within the MDK app.  One option would be using a nativescript plugin with your branded client.  Another would be creating your own native extension control to do it.

Might be easiest to investigate if there is a plugin that will provide what you need instead of creating from scratch.  It will all depend on your use case.

entry.title: Android Build disable by google-service.json
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

After Sunday, i cannot build for android because it's missing google-service.json, after a quick search its a file from firebase but i don't use firebase nor have firebase configured in my app, i also looked if I installed any Flow function that requires firebase.

Besides small changes in my app, i didn't installed or changed any function or component requiring firebase, i don't know what to do now!

entry.title: Implement TD19 on SAP BYD
entry.content:
How did you implement the use of TD19? and related registration in the self-invoice register?

TD19: Integration/self invoice for the purchase of goods under art.17 c.2 DPR 633/72; for example, the purchase of goods already in Italian territory from non-resident entities with tax representation or direct identification.

entry.title: Document splitting on Segment, do we must add Profit center or not in view V_FAGL_SPLIT_FLD
entry.content:
Hello,

 

We want to activate splitting on segment, the question is what is it the impact / risk if we don't assign into the view V_FAGL_SPLIT_FLD the profit center?

I have always listen that with segment it's recommended to add profit center, I think there are some risks if we are going like that, but I can't find any OSS note that are saying we can or we can't.

I mention we activate the Profit center accounting.

Someone can help us on the topic ?

Thanks in advance,

Philippe

entry.title: Import fixed assets with mutiple quantity per item
entry.content:
How do you import fixed assets that contain quantities greater than 1 for a single record?
example, I purchase 20 PCs of the same model, do I have to create 20 single lines records or can I import a single row by entering the quantity of the elements?

entry.title: How to make Dlv.schedule & Dlv.sched.date optional in Forecast Delivery Schedule tab in SAP SD?
entry.content:
Hello Team,
Business wants to make the two fields (Dlv.schedule & Dlv.sched.date) as optional in Forecast Delivery Schedule (FDS) tab in the schedling agreement in SAP SD.
Could you please advise this configuration?

entry.title: Re: ByD / C4C Built-in Support is down
entry.content:
Dear @NavDan,

We understand the urgency and will make sure to update the blog as soon as the issue is fixed.

Our team is working diligently to resolve it as quickly as possible.

Regards,
Vinicius

entry.title: Calling Fragment Form & Send it as an attachment using ABAP Walk-Through
entry.content:
This Blog is based on the Output Management Form and has all of its configuration completed 

Ex for dunning: use maintenance view: V_T047E using code: sm30 to switch between frameworks through drop-down list

First: you can identify Fields for Key & Master Key internal tables for standard fragment form through putting a breaking point

By using framework: sap cloud and using fragment form template  and of course maintain brf+ configuration

In class: CL_SOMU_FORM_SERVICES , Method : GET_DOCUMENT

  1. Put a break point in the first line and go back to the previous program to see internal tables passed to form calling for keys.
  2. Take screenshots for them, as you will be using them for the custom calling of the form as these fields are maintained according to configuration & master form template derivation.
  3. If you need the application ID Key, it’s a concatenation between multiple variables, You will find it in the call back class specific to a given object in the SPRO configuration

SPRO -> CROSS APPLICATION COMPONENTS -> OUTPUT CONTROL (here you can find all of OM Configuration)  -> DEFINE OUTPUT TYPE THEN SELECT THE ENTRY CORRESPONDING TO YOUR BRF+ ROLE and click details, you will find your call back class, in our class for dunning : CL_FIN_FO_DUNN_OUTPUT , all call back classes Implement same interface, then go into method : IF_APOC_COMMON_API~GET_FDP_PARAMETER

Second step:

Activate the legacy printout system and put a breakpoint inside the printing object whether it’s a program or function module, if you are using PDF, you can put a breakpoint in open job FM and trace back through the stack to the transaction screen printing program

In our case for dunning: It prints using FM : “PRINT_DUNNING_NOTICE_PDF”, put a breakpoint there

  1. Start comparing the values of the key & master key internal table with local variables available to locate the objects that contain the data which will  be passed to the fragment forms Key internal tables from the standard
    1. You will find all the data u need in the objects because whether it is fragment, PDF or whatever technology, the system always collects the same data passed one way or the other
  2. After that start creating your custom code to call the fragment form
    • Consider the condition to identify which master form template to use.
  3. Create an enhancement in the standard program to defuse the standard code and prevent its execution, make sure that the standard code doesn’t update standard somewhere along the code as you need to confirm whether it happens through the OData service of fragment or not! ( because if not you will have to use the standard code that does that to make everything consistent )
  1. then test the cycle end to end

in our case , here is the example for the PO Form

  1. I created a custom program se38 to test using po form
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Report ZDUMMY
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
REPORT ZDUMMY.




SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF BLOCK b1.
  PARAMETERS: p_po_num TYPE ebeln MATCHCODE OBJECT h_ekko OBLIGATORY.
SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK b1.



INITIALIZATION.



START-OF-SELECTION.
  DATA: lo_cl_somu_form_services TYPE REF TO cl_somu_form_services.
  DATA: lt_keys TYPE cl_somu_form_services=>ty_gt_key.
  DATA: ls_ekko TYPE ekko.
  DATA: lt_master_keys TYPE cl_somu_form_services=>ty_gt_key.
  DATA: lv_content TYPE  xstring.
  DATA: lv_xml TYPE xstring.
  DATA: lv_pages TYPE  fppagecount.
  DATA: lv_trace_string  TYPE string.
  DATA: lv_stop_processing TYPE  abap_bool.
  DATA: lt_message TYPE cl_somu_form_services=>ty_gt_message.
  DATA: lv_output_length TYPE i.
  DATA: lt_generated_pdf  TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF tbl1024 .

  FIELD-SYMBOLS: <ls_key> TYPE cl_somu_form_services=>ty_gs_key.



  SELECT SINGLE *
    FROM ekko
    INTO ls_ekko
    WHERE ebeln = p_po_num.


  " --------------------------- Values for the purchase order form ---------------------------
  APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_keys ASSIGNING <ls_key>.
  <ls_key>-name = 'PurchaseOrder'.
  <ls_key>-value = p_po_num.

  APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_keys ASSIGNING <ls_key>.
  <ls_key>-name = 'SenderCountry'.
  <ls_key>-value = 'DE'.

  APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_keys ASSIGNING <ls_key>.
  <ls_key>-name = 'PurchaseOrderChangeFlag'.
  <ls_key>-value = space.

  APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_keys ASSIGNING <ls_key>.
  <ls_key>-name = 'Language'.
  <ls_key>-value = 'E'.


  APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_keys ASSIGNING <ls_key>.
  <ls_key>-name = 'ReceiverPartnerNumber'.
  <ls_key>-value = ls_ekko-lifnr.

  " --------------------------- Values for the master form template ---------------------------
  APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_master_keys ASSIGNING <ls_key>.
  <ls_key>-name = 'PrintFormDerivationRule'.
  <ls_key>-value = 'PURCHASE_ORDER_MASTER_FOR_COMPANY'.

  APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_master_keys ASSIGNING <ls_key>.
  <ls_key>-name = 'WatermarkText'.
  <ls_key>-value = space.

  APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_master_keys ASSIGNING <ls_key>.
  <ls_key>-name = 'LocaleCountry'.
  <ls_key>-value = 'DE'.

  APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_master_keys ASSIGNING <ls_key>.
  <ls_key>-name = 'LocaleLanguage'.
  <ls_key>-value = 'E'.

  APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_master_keys ASSIGNING <ls_key>.
  <ls_key>-name = 'OutputControlApplicationObjectType'.
  <ls_key>-value = 'PURCHASE_ORDER'.

  APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_master_keys ASSIGNING <ls_key>.
  <ls_key>-name = 'OutputControlApplicationObject'.
  <ls_key>-value = p_po_num.

  APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_master_keys ASSIGNING <ls_key>.
  <ls_key>-name = 'OutputRequestItem'.
  <ls_key>-value = '000001'.

  APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_master_keys ASSIGNING <ls_key>.
  <ls_key>-name = 'OutputDocumentType'.
  <ls_key>-value = 'PURCHASE_ORDER'.

  APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_master_keys ASSIGNING <ls_key>.
  <ls_key>-name = 'Recipient'.
  <ls_key>-value = ls_ekko-lifnr.

  APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_master_keys ASSIGNING <ls_key>.
  <ls_key>-name = 'RecipientRole'.
  <ls_key>-value = 'LF'.

  APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_master_keys ASSIGNING <ls_key>.
  <ls_key>-name = 'SenderCountry'.
  <ls_key>-value = 'DE'.


  lo_cl_somu_form_services = cl_somu_form_services=>get_instance( ).


  lo_cl_somu_form_services->get_document( 
   EXPORTING iv_master_form_name  = 'SOMU_FORM_MASTER_A4'
             iv_form_name         = 'MM_PUR_PURCHASE_ORDER'
             it_key               = lt_keys
             it_master_key        = lt_master_keys
             iv_form_language     = 'E'
             iv_form_country      = 'DE'
  IMPORTING  ev_content          = lv_content
             ev_xml               = lv_xml
             ev_pages             = lv_pages
             ev_trace_string      = lv_trace_string
             ev_stop_processing   = lv_stop_processing
             et_message           = lt_message ).
  IF sy-subrc <> 0.
  ENDIF.


  CALL FUNCTION 'SCMS_XSTRING_TO_BINARY'
    EXPORTING
      buffer        = lv_content
    IMPORTING
      output_length = lv_output_length
    TABLES
      binary_tab    = lt_generated_pdf.


  " Shows a preview of the generated PDF file in a popup window.
  CALL FUNCTION 'FDM_COLL_INV_PDF_SHOW'
    EXPORTING
      t_pdf = lt_generated_pdf.


"=================================================================================================================

  "Object References
DATA: lo_bcs         TYPE REF TO cl_bcs,
      lo_doc_bcs     TYPE REF TO cl_document_bcs,
      lo_recep       TYPE REF TO if_recipient_bcs,
      lo_sapuser_bcs TYPE REF TO cl_sapuser_bcs,
      lo_cx_bcx      TYPE REF TO cx_bcs,
      lv_string_text  TYPE string,
      lt_text           TYPE bcsy_text,
      lv_bin_filesize TYPE so_obj_len,
      lv_sent_to_all  TYPE os_boolean,
      lt_binary_content TYPE solix_tab.

  CALL FUNCTION 'SCMS_XSTRING_TO_BINARY'
    EXPORTING
      buffer        = lv_content
    IMPORTING
      output_length = lv_output_length
    TABLES
      binary_tab    = lt_binary_content[].

lv_bin_filesize = lv_output_length.

  TRY.
*     -------- create persistent send request ------------------------
    lo_bcs = cl_bcs=>create_persistent( ).
      "First line
      CONCATENATE 
                 'Dear Colleague' cl_abap_char_utilities=>newline 
      INTO lv_string_text.
    APPEND lv_string_text TO lt_text.
    CLEAR lv_string_text.
    "Second line
    CONCATENATE 'Please find attached a test smartform.'
     cl_abap_char_utilities=>newline INTO lv_string_text.
    APPEND lv_string_text TO lt_text.
    CLEAR lv_string_text.
    "Third line
    APPEND 'Best Regards,' TO lt_text.
    "Fourth line
    APPEND 'Systems Administrator.' TO lt_text.

*---------------------------------------------------------------------
*-----------------&      Create Document     *------------------------
*---------------------------------------------------------------------
    lo_doc_bcs = cl_document_bcs=>create_document(
                    i_type    = 'RAW'
                    i_text    = lt_text[]
                    i_length  = '12'
                    i_subject = 'Test Email' ).   "Subject of the Email

*---------------------------------------------------------------------
*-----------------&   Add attachment to document     *----------------
*---------------------------------------------------------------------
*     BCS expects document content here e.g. from document upload
*     binary_content = ...
    CALL METHOD lo_doc_bcs->add_attachment
      EXPORTING
        i_attachment_type    = 'PDF'
        i_attachment_size    = lv_bin_filesize
        i_attachment_subject = 'Test Email'
        i_att_content_hex    = lt_binary_content.

*     add document to send request
    CALL METHOD lo_bcs->set_document( lo_doc_bcs ).

*---------------------------------------------------------------------
*------------------------&   Set Sender     *-------------------------
*---------------------------------------------------------------------
*    lo_sapuser_bcs = cl_sapuser_bcs=>create( sy-uname ).
*    CALL METHOD lo_bcs->set_sender
*      EXPORTING
*        i_sender = lo_sapuser_bcs.

lo_recep = 
cl_cam_address_bcs=>create_internet_address('Receiving Email Address').

"Add recipient with its respective attributes to send request
    CALL METHOD lo_bcs->add_recipient
      EXPORTING
        i_recipient = lo_recep
        i_express   = 'X'.

    CALL METHOD lo_bcs->set_send_immediately
      EXPORTING
        i_send_immediately = 'X'.

*---------------------------------------------------------------------
*-----------------&   Send the email    *-----------------------------
*---------------------------------------------------------------------
    CALL METHOD lo_bcs->send(
      EXPORTING
        i_with_error_screen = 'X'
      RECEIVING
        result              = lv_sent_to_all ).

    IF lv_sent_to_all IS NOT INITIAL.
      COMMIT WORK.
    ENDIF.


*---------------------------------------------------------------------
*-----------------&   Exception Handling     *------------------------
*---------------------------------------------------------------------
  CATCH cx_bcs INTO lo_cx_bcx.
    "Appropriate Exception Handling
    WRITE: 'Exception:', lo_cx_bcx->error_type.
ENDTRY.

PS. you can use same concept if you are creating a total custom fragment on your own but you need to 

  • Create OData Model 
  • Create Master Template using Maintain Form Template Fiori APP / SFP

  • Create Content Template using Maintain Form Template Fiori APP / SFP

Start building Up your Solution, i haven't tried build a full custom solution from A to Z but this is the main idea for it

entry.title: Consume SOAP API within the same S4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am building a developer extension in S4HANA Cloud.  I need to consume a SOAP API for posting some data into S4H.  I can call this API from SAPUI5 to post but I am exploring the possibility of calling the API within S4H using RAP.  I am not sure how to do this.

Any help is appreciated as this will help me process volume data using the custom App.

Thanks,

Vijay

entry.title: Re: Supporting Multiple API Gateways with SAP API Management – using Azure API Management as example
entry.content:
Nice blog!

I guess the externally managed APIs are only for documentation purposes and you cannot “try them out”, right? Or is there a way to call their API proxy and really execute them?

BR

Javier

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI latest patch
entry.content:
@burkhard_berger 

No 7.70 any more for me neither:

Best to contact your VAR partner. I had to contact SAP recently, because I couldn't download 'SAPSCRIPT LEGACY TEXT EDITOR' any more, and they told me to go through my VAR partner. My VAR partner sent me the installer file without issue.

entry.title: Re: AQL Defect Recording in QM public cloud
entry.content:
Hi @subramani_sevanan 

 

The Documentation of the defects app F2929 only mentions that Generic Defect and Production Defect are possible.

 

If these aren't suitable then please raise a feature request for your requirement by following the 

KBA 2963059 ( https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2963059 )

Best regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere: Basic auth for the catalog and consum...
entry.content:
Hi @KarlHakanNordgr,

No, basic authentication not supported for using SAP Datasphere OData API. 

You have to define OAuth client in your SAP Datasphere tenant. Check out Access the SAP Datasphere OData API 

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI latest patch
entry.content:
SAP is very fast in removing unsupported stuff (eg also corrections instructions for no longer supported versions).

Legally one is not allowed to forward sap notes or downloaded sap software, even not to other customers.

entry.title: Re: Final Review Step in Onboarding 2.0 Process
entry.content:
Thanks for the blog. We have tested this and not sure if this is linked to some of the current issues with the new journey introduced and being looked at, but adding this step is creating alot of confusion for the onboardee for a few reasons:

1. although they will have completed all the necessary actions before it goes to the final review stage, in the onboardee homepage the last task will still show as to be completed.

2. if you send back the personal information after final review, all of the tasks after the personal data step show as locked: 

But once more the homepage shows no more items to complete.

Is anyone else having similar issues with the final review? Is there a configuration that we missed so that it tells the onboardee that their submission has gone to final review step?

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services - Week 3
entry.content:
My submission for week 3.

I encountered the same error as @moh_ali_square posted. As the document says "scenarioId refer to pre-existing values", I tried to find where the scenarioId is defined. I found it by calling the following endpoint. I hope this is the right approach.

entry.title: Re: Consume SOAP API within the same S4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @vkesarir,

Please check out

  • How to call local SOAP API in BTP ABAP environment?
  • SAP BTP, ABAP environment > SOAP Outbound Communication

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: Unable to load shared library '/home/site/wwwroot/libadonetHDB.dll' or one of its dependencies.
entry.content: This is what I see after downloading from https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/additional/hanaclient-dotnetcore-latest-linux-x64.tar.gz

entry.title: Bin Location Management
entry.content:
Hello,

We are using SAP Business One 9.3 version for SAP HANA (9.30.140).
I am having issues updating bin location properties (specifically UDF) in Bin Location Management window.

For example, I will select User-Defined Fields and update my Sort by Allocation field to value 5.

However, after selecting "OK" it doesn't show 5 as the value to be updated in the preview. Even if I click Update, it does not update the actual property. 

When I click the User Defined Fields property again, the selected checkbox I checked is also never checked anymore.

If I update the UDF for each individual bin from the Bin Location Master Data, there are no issues updating. It's just that the batch update function in Bin Location Management window seems to not be working.

entry.title: Re: Add new check box on ME59N transaction selection screen and based on that split PO
entry.content: How can we add?

entry.title: Re: Leading ledger 0L disappears after Funds Management activation
entry.content: Hi Valentyna, we faced a similar issue during the activation in a testing system and the report fixed it for us. The issue in our case was the subapplication. Please check note 1766739 and check the tables mentioned there if you find inconsistencies. As soon as the inconsistency was fixed the Ledger appeared again and the system seemed to work fine. Best wishes!

entry.title: Re: IAS for Onboarding Welcome Email not triggering - How...
entry.content:
Hello Carolina,

Confirm that the IAS is enabled in provisioning. Also, check to see if your tasks were created.  I experienced this where the IAS email did not trigger, but my tasks did not get created.

I followed the following KBA and it triggered the IAS email. 3107386 - No Tasks Created in Dashboard - Onboarding - SAP for Me

If the IAS emails are still not triggering, you will need to create a support ticket.

Regards,

Roberta Mondave

entry.title: Is there any plan for enhancing the Quick Actions below:
entry.content:
• Promotion – action does not have a step to make a comp recommendation with the promotion. The manager would need to do the promotion via quick action, then go back to Change Job and Comp to make a pay change in an additional step. No value to using the quick action without the pay update.
  • Transfer – Manager transfer QA does not update the position and there’s no toggle to also move the position. Would need to apply the quick action and then update the position in separate steps. No value in using this quick action without the sync.

entry.title: First Half 2024 Release: What’s New in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central?
entry.content:
The First Half 2024 Release delivers many exciting innovations and enhancements within SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central. These capabilities are designed to improve the user experience and simplify tasks, while boosting efficiency with the help of AI technology. Here is a quick snapshot of what you can expect to see in this release:

New People Profile Experiences
We are excited to unveil two new people profile experiences – the profile preview and the spotlight view. The profile preview provides a quick snapshot of key areas of the employee profile, including job, manager, location, and contact details. Additionally, the spotlight view allows employees to build and represent their personal brand by showcasing skills and competencies, mentoring and target roles, and other relevant personal and organizational information sourced from across SAP SuccessFactors solutions.

Profile Preview and Spotlight View

Refreshed Org Chart
We are also introducing a new org chart experience with a refreshed look and feel. Available on desktop and mobile devices, users can explore their organizational structure with streamlined expand and collapse capabilities. In addition, users can quickly navigate to an employee’s profile preview, with an option to open the new spotlight view of the people profile.

Refreshed Org Chart

Simplified Self-Services
To further simplify the self-service experience, we are introducing additional quick actions for SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central, including the ability to create and edit positions and view and change job relationships. These quick actions are also available in Joule, our AI copilot, and within the SAP SuccessFactors app for Microsoft Teams. Additionally, a new “My Team Positions” experience, accessible directly from the home page, provides managers with a clear tile-based overview of positions. Managers can directly view, edit, and create positions without the need to navigate between multiple screens. And finally, admins and managers can now access a summary of all pending workflow requests, making it easier to keep track of sent and received approvals.

My Team Positions

AI-Assisted Person Insights
We are also excited to share the availability of AI-assisted person insights, a new generative AI feature that gives people managers the employee insights they need by responsibly summarizing complex information from SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central. With this release, insights based on an employee’s compensation and job history are available to help managers lead effective and well-informed compensation discussions.

AI-Assisted Person Insights

Automatic Processing of New Hires
Customers can now automatically process new hires from SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting and SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding into SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central. This capability further reduces the time to hire, such as in cases of mass, seasonal, or high-volume hiring.

New Benefits Enrollment Experience
With this release, we are also introducing a new benefits enrollment experience for insurance, savings, and pension benefit types. Available on both desktop and mobile devices, the guided experience for benefits election makes the process more convenient through improved navigation and increases confidence with side-by-side plan comparisons and embedded instructional text. Learn more about the new benefits enrollment experience here.

These are just a few of the many innovations in the SAP SuccessFactors First Half 2024 Release. To learn more, check out the resources below:

  • Visit the SAP SuccessFactors Community for release documentation, product videos, and solution area blogs
  • Watch the 1H 2024 Release Highlights Video, featuring Bianka Woelke, GVP Head of Application Product Management

entry.title: Re: I can release a target group which is not approved
entry.content:
Hello Katharina,

Still waiting for an answer. Sorry for the delay.

Best Regards, Isabelle

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now compatibility with non-sap platforms
entry.content:
Hi,

It depends on what you mean by compatible.  Can Enable Now be used to record Simulations for the systems, almost definitely yes.  Will SAP Companion run in any of those systems, it's possible but not certain. If any of the functionality listed below is developed using Fiori and deployed from a Fiori Launchpad or SAP Build Work Zone, it is likely that SAP Companion can be used with the functionality.  If the functionality is not developed in Fiori and not deployed from a Launchpad or Build Work Zone, then it is still possible that SAP Companion could be used with the systems but some level of technical integration work will definitely be required.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Exploring SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI: A Comprehensive Review
entry.content:
Dear Uwe, 

none. You have to map (change) the SNC names.

entry.title: Re: Direct link to a SAP Enable Now Glossary
entry.content:
Hi Andrew,

Yes, it is definitely possible to access the Glossary directly from Enable Now Manager.  To do this:

1. Open Manager and click on the highest level folder in the Glossary structure, e.g. it might to called SAP Glossary or something Similar
2. Publish the Glossary content - click the down arrow next to More and select Publish All Objects
3. Click the down arrow next to All Content, in the top, right corner, and select Published
4. When the screen redisplays, click on the highest level folder for the Glossary content again
5. Copy the Start Link URL and that can be used to start the Glossary directly.  When you run that URL in a browser you should seen something like the following image

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Best way to generate Microsoft Word docx from ABAP
entry.content:
Hello @antonsikidin! Is it possible to use your solution together with the default charts of a Word document. My requirements is to dynamically load data into the spreadsheet that appears when we insert a chart in a word document, so the idea is to create a template with some charts in it, then modify the data to fit the number of columns that will be exported from abap, then, -and here comes my doubt- use your solution to dynamically fill the spreadsheet underlying the chart.

To give an example, I am referring to this kind of chart and its underlying data in a spreadsheet:

Image taken from here.

entry.title: Re: Infix filters in CAP Node.js not working
entry.content: @SAPSupport ? @david_kunz2 ?

entry.title: Re: How to enable activation email in IAS for manual impo...
entry.content:
Hi @George_Yu 

Thank you for your input.

I too follow your approach, detailed steps as follows:

  1. In S/4HANA public cloud, import (or manually create) the worker-id; then create the business user + assign relevant roles.
  2. From the S/4HANA "Maintain Business User" app, export the business users using the menu option Download --> Download for IDP.
  3. In IAS, import the user.

This process creates the user-ids in IAS, but does not send an activation email to the newly created users; I need to manually generate the email.

I am trying to find a solution to automate the email process while importing the users. 

Best regards,

Shaji

entry.title: Re: How to record the class not to delete the item from t...
entry.content:
Hi 

This is a scenario that requires a bit of sequence. Please play around with the setting as detailed in this KBA. If you set a threshold and then register them on the class that is later in the year, you might be able to still enrol them.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors: External content is being cut off
entry.content:
Hi

To my knowledge, 16:9 is a standard ratio and must work. What content creation tool are you using? Is this the same behaviour on all browsers?

Thank you

entry.content: In short, this is a ticket to SAP.

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI Sunset
entry.content: Thanks again.

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA Advanced available to promise Location Substitution Configurations steps.
entry.content: Great article, simple well documented and easily explain, thanks for sharing.

entry.title: Missing Production Variances in Project Cost Report
entry.content:
In an ETO scenario (scope item 6GD), the Journal entry triggered by the Event Based Variances is correctly posting the Variance Categories to the WBS Element

However, I'm not able to see these lines (From Journal Entry item ) in the Apps "Project Cost Report - Plan/Actual" - "Project Cost Report - Line Items" .

Why?

Please consider that the variances G/L Accounts are already included in the FSV YPS2 (by standard).


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Missing Production Variances in Project Cost Report
entry.content:
Please check the help portal page for explanation about variance posting:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/4032610758dc437089f0c28320eec93f/30c0e13eb0264108943e5a552ed59cc2.html

In the View Variances part:

With the following reporting apps, you can view event-based production variances in company code currency, group currency and freely defined currencies in parallel ledgers:
Analyze Production Costs - Event-Based

Order Cost Details - Event-Based
Product Profitability with Production Variances
In these reports, the variance is not split by G/L account, because all the variances are posted on the same price difference account (PRD). Instead, the SLALITTYPE (Subledger-Specific Line Item Type) field is introduced to categorize the variances:
Input Price Variance (9130)

Input Quantity Variance (9131)

Resource Usage Variance (9132)

Output Price Variance (9138)
Lot-Size Variance (9139)

Remaining Variance (9140)

entry.title: Re: sap ai launchpad add application error
entry.content: Hi, did you try to add a sap linked github repository to it? It can only and external project to the application, the internal project cannot add to it.

entry.title: Re: When using Crystal Report in C#, a specific part of a...
entry.content:
I was using SP33 before, and when I installed SP35 on another PC and tested it, the issue remained unresolved.

Interestingly, even when compressing the image quality to 20%, the problem persisted.
At that point, instead of turning black, the image distorted into red.

Unable to see an immediate solution, I'm currently modifying the lift options in all Crystal Report templates.
It would be great if in the future, we could set the 'Retain Original Image Color Depth' option in VS (.NET) for reports.
